{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321130754CDDDD574C564C0743567"}"},"total":787},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7397442785425769240","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"整体来说比较不错，人物形象刻画很好，内容也比较偏日常，攻略时细节描绘的很好，不管是方江浅浅楚禾还是顾清秋又或是顾清颖也都很好，就是进度比较慢，目前我在六百七十多章方杰还在读大一和顾清颖也才有了实质性的进展。总结来说有耐心的很推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722353362,"group_id":"7180171245885852711","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0NevhQHb7bMXWiW1d7t2bA=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3b1784cfa3174eaea9d16874de89b306~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622504&x-signature=G0GWqlllz%2BP17KZEBAjg43QlUu0%3D","user_id":"109259199719","user_name":"（凌华）"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109259199719","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7180171245885852711","book_info":{"abstract":"重生+系统+创业+日常+富萝莉+神豪+非单
慢热型介意勿进
奋斗几年，工资还没房价涨的快。
初入社会的他以为自己是一匹黑马，结果发现自己就是一头牛马。
生为牛马，我很抱歉！
命运降下，给了他一次重来的机会
重来一次，本想弥补遗憾的他，结果遇到了一个又一个宝藏女孩。
而且，她们似乎都在白给？
这一次重生，命运似乎又给了他新的选择和新的考验？
不过嘛，大人才做选择题，我小孩全都要！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0ba51320c46e72cbc1ca0b17bcfff9c8","author":"卖女柴的小火孩","author_id":"","book_id":"7180171245885852711","book_name":"重生：她们都太爱白给了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d0d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6007人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7187350816120898105","read_count":"6007","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2773896"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"1281","tags":"都市种田,都市,系统,神豪,重生,多女主,校花","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/068c3e101d58f460b0f120c6d8efd54c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253674&x-signature=TttS8DeYhoYzq3kdqjhvfj6wcYo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3571635014343527","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"837"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321130754CDDDD574C564C0743567"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_co
